markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members and provide a comprehensive overview of GrowthX's vision, strategy, and product development.](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building an AI-first platform to revolutionize marketing, bridging the gap between AI development and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [The company has achieved $11.5M in run rate within 14 months, demonstrating strong market demand and capital efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach focuses on delivering outcomes through a unique blend of AI technology and expert-led services, targeting a $3.2B serviceable obtainable market](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [The core product, Atlas, is an internal platform that combines context engines, knowledge bases, and AI-powered workflows to scale high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

## Topics

### Company Culture and Goals

  - [Three main goals for every team member:](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
    1.  Do the best work of their lives
    2.  Inspire everyone around them and outside the company
    3.  Achieve more than thought possible
  - [Emphasis on execution, effectiveness, and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - ["Best hire mentality" encouraged for all team members](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Business Performance and Market Position

  - [$11.5M run rate achieved in 14 months](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [$1.7M closed in the current month (10 deals)](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [7% gross margins](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [237K burn rate last month, with over $1M in NetNew added](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Notable clients include N-ABLE, Spectre Ops, and Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Product Vision and Development

  - [Building the future of marketing with an AI-first approach](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Atlas: Internal platform powering service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [Features: Context engine, knowledge base, AI-assisted editing, analytics (in development)](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Workflow-as-code engine for scalable, agentic processes](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [CheckThat.ai: Upcoming visibility play](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)

### Market Opportunity and Strategy

  - [Targeting the intersection of sales/marketing labor and content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [$3.2B serviceable obtainable market based on current tool spend](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Focus on high-profile clients to build trust and credibility in various categories](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

### Competitive Advantage

  - [Outcomes-based approach vs. traditional agencies or AI workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Unique position to understand and describe work, then build scalable AI-powered solutions](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Generation of valuable "expert frontier data" as a byproduct of service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue development of Atlas platform, focusing on analytics and user experience improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [Launch CheckThat.ai visibility tool](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Expand marketing jobs coverage and potentially open up the infrastructure for external use](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Team members to familiarize themselves with Atlas and provide feedback as they use it](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Ongoing communication and feedback loops between team and leadership to refine strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/Eyxo2jB6rQcsxpf5yj9HuanvjV7hMHAb?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
